top_signals.title: Why is China's Xi Hosting Russia's Putin After Trump Visit? | The Pulse 5/20
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests:
Bhanu Baweja, UBS Investment Bank, Chief Strategist; Pierre Wunsch, National Bank of Belgium, Governor; Sebastian Mallaby, Council on Foreign Relations, Senior Fellow; Jed Laskowitz, JPMorgan Asset Management, Private Markets and Customized Solutions Global Head.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Mortgage Rates Rose Last Week to an Almost Two-Month High
top_signals.summary: US mortgage rates increased last week to an almost two-month high, weighing on home purchase activity.
